channel.title: essay on Cillian Berragan
channel.description: Recent content in essay on Cillian Berragan

item.title: Utilising Supervised Parametric Classification to Assess the Quality of the UK Rural Road Network using Aerial LiDAR Data
item.description: This page contains my dissertation submitted as part of of Masters degree. PDF Repository Link

item.title: Assessment of Area Based Government Policy in the United Kingdom in Relation to the Modifiable Areal Unit Problem
item.description: This essay presents a critique of Area Based Policy in the United Kingdom, a fairly recent development that aims to target specified geographic areas to tackle socioeconomic problems.
